narrative.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market, with the Fear & Greed Index plumbing depths not seen since the August 2024 bottom, yet stablecoin reserves are quietly ballooning as sidelined capital waits for a spark. This is the same dissonance we saw in August—extreme bearish sentiment colliding with building buying pressure—right before a violent mean reversion ripped price back above $60K. The powder keg is being filled; the crowd just refuses to see it.
narrative.headline: Dry Powder Meets Peak Disbelief

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc points to a sharp sentiment reset, where the extreme fear and sidelined capital ignite a relief rally that catches the majority off guard.
